grounding_checkpoint_required: Apply migration 0026 to production Supabase (project xpanlbcjueimeofgsara) — was NOT applied by builder, only written. Use Supabase MCP or dashboard SQL editor.
Trigger a test purpose_review callback from Telegram (tap 👍/✏️/🗑️ on a synthetic message) and verify agent_events row is created with domain=purpose_review and correct action value.
Set status=awaiting_review on a real task_queue row, wait for checkPurposeReviewTimeouts to run, verify status flips to review_timeout and loeppky_alerts_bot fires the alert.
unknowns: ActorType enum in lib/attribution/types.ts does not include 'colin' — used actor_type='human' with actor_id='telegram' instead, which is consistent with what the type allows. Coordinator should decide whether to add 'colin' to ActorType or keep 'human'.

Text-reply routing in the !callbackQuery branch uses a DB query for the most recent awaiting_review task (ordered by last_heartbeat_at DESC). If multiple modules are awaiting_review simultaneously and Colin replies without a reply_to_message reference, the match is best-effort. Coordinator should note this limitation and consider whether to add review_message_id to task_queue.metadata when sending the purpose review message.
next_chunk_blockers: Migration 0026 must be applied before any task_queue row can be set to status=awaiting_review or review_timeout — any port chunk that triggers purpose_review will fail until the migration is applied.
